sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Track blue square positions across history
for i, entry in enumerate(history):
    nodes = entry.frame.segmentation['nodes']
    blue_squares = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
    positions = []
    for sq in blue_squares:
        boundary = sq['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        positions.append((min(rows), min(cols)))
    print("Step %d: %s" % (entry.frame.step, positions))
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>

# Track blue square positions across history
for i, entry in enumerate(history):
    nodes = entry.frame.segmentation['nodes']
    blue_squares = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
    positions = []
    for sq in blue_squares:
        boundary = sq['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        positions.append((min(rows), min(cols)))
    print("Step %d: %s" % (entry.frame.step, positions))
